name: Applesauce Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9x5x3 loaf pan.
3. Sift together 2 cups all-purpose flour, 3 teaspoons baking powder, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon baking soda onto waxed paper.
4. Add the coarsely chopped walnuts to the sifted ingredients.
5. In a mixing bowl, beat the egg.
6. Gradually add the applesauce and melted shortening to the beaten egg.
7. Slowly incorporate the sifted flour mixture into the bowl until just combined.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
9. Bake for 1 hour in the preheated oven.
10. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it.
11. Cool the bread overnight before slicing.
